dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: View your academic profile and competency analysis. Upload your Transcript of Records to get AI-generated insights about your strengths and research readiness.

findThesis.title: Find Thesis
findThesis.description: Chat with our AI assistant to discover research opportunities and thesis topics. Ask about current research trends, specific chairs, and get personalized recommendations based on your academic profile.

chairExplorer.title: Chair Explorer
chairExplorer.description: Browse all available research chairs and their publications. Explore each chair's research focus and current projects to find the best fit for your interests.

proposals.title: My Proposals
proposals.description: View and manage your research proposals. See proposals suggested by the AI assistant and track their status as you develop your research idea.

transcriptNotProcessing.question: Why is my transcript not processing?
transcriptNotProcessing.answer: Make sure you've uploaded a valid PDF file. The file should be your official Transcript of Records. If the issue persists, try uploading again or contact support.

noProposals.question: I don't see any proposals. What should I do?
noProposals.answer: Start a conversation in the 'Find Thesis' chat to discuss your interests with the AI assistant. It will generate proposal suggestions based on our conversation and your academic profile.

aiResponse.question: The AI is giving me incorrect information. Is this normal?
aiResponse.answer: The AI assistant can make mistakes. Always verify important information with your advisor or by checking the original sources. We're constantly improving the AI's accuracy.

whatIsCompetency.question: What is my competency profile?
whatIsCompetency.answer: Your competency profile is an AI-generated analysis of your skills and knowledge areas based on your courses. It helps identify your strengths and areas for improvement for research projects.

howToStartProposal.question: How do I start developing a thesis proposal?
howToStartProposal.answer: Use the 'Find Thesis' chat to discuss your interests, ask about research trends, and explore chair information. The AI will help you brainstorm and generate proposal ideas tailored to your profile.

changeLanguage.question: Can I switch between languages?
changeLanguage.answer: Yes! Go to the Settings tab and select your preferred language. Your choice is saved automatically.

contactSupport.question: How do I contact support?
contactSupport.answer: If you encounter any issues or have questions not answered here, please reach out to your advisor or check your institution's support resources.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.readyForProject: Ready for your next research project?
dashboard.dragDrop: Drag your PDF document here or click to select a file. Our AI analyzes your academic history in seconds.
dashboard.processingError: Transcript could not be processed. Please try again.
dashboard.processingStill: Processing is still in progress. Please reload later.
dashboard.aiExtracts: The AI extracts your courses and calculates your competency profile.
dashboard.clickToUpload: Click to upload a new transcript.
dashboard.uploadToUnlock: Upload your current Transcript of Records to unlock your detailed competency analysis.
dashboard.radarInfo: The axes are derived from your course names. Upload your transcript to see your personal competency profile.

chat.title: Find Thesis
chat.greeting: Hello! I've analyzed your transcript. You have strong foundations in AI and Statistics. What would you like to learn more about today? I have access to current publications and chair information.
chat.disclaimer: AI can make mistakes. Always verify important information.
chat.researchQuestion: Ask research question… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)
chat.stillWorking: Still working on it — your reply will appear here once it's ready.

chairs.title: Chair Explorer
chairs.adminCanCreate: Admins can create chairs from the Admin page.
chairs.browse: Browse all research chairs and open a focused repository dashboard for each chair.

proposals.title: My Proposals
proposals.allProposals: Overview of all available topic proposals
proposals.generateWithAI: Chat with the AI Assistant and ask them to generate proposals for you. They will appear here.
proposals.noMatching: No proposals found for this filter.
